hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm -rf|git push --force|git push -f |git reset --hard|git checkout \.|git restore \.|git clean -f|drop table|truncate table)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Destructive command detected. Ask Mamoun before running destructive operations."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

SQL=$(jq -r '.tool_input.query // .tool_input.sql // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$SQL" ] && echo "$SQL" | grep -qiE '(DROP\s+(TABLE|SCHEMA|DATABASE|INDEX|VIEW|FUNCTION|TRIGGER|POLICY)|TRUNCATE|DELETE\s+FROM\s+[a-z_]+\s*(;|$)|ALTER\s+TABLE\s+[a-z_]+\s+DROP|GRANT\s+|REVOKE\s+|CREATE\s+ROLE|ALTER\s+ROLE|UPDATE\s+[a-z_]+\s+SET\s+.*WHERE\s+1\s*=\s*1|DELETE\s+FROM\s+tenants|DELETE\s+FROM\s+company_entities|DELETE\s+FROM\s+individual_entities)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Destructive SQL detected (DROP/TRUNCATE/mass DELETE/GRANT/REVOKE/protected table DELETE). Ask Mamoun before running DDL."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

CONTENT=$(jq -r '.tool_input.content // .tool_input.new_string // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$CONTENT" ] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|gho_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xoxb-[a-zA-Z0-9]+|xoxp-[a-zA-Z0-9]+|sb-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|supabase_service_role_key|SUPABASE_KEY=|N8N_TOKEN=|INSTANTLY_API_KEY=|HEYREACH_API_KEY=|GHL_API_KEY=|CLAY_API_KEY=|phc_[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|sntrys_[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,})'; then FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qiE '(\.env\.example|\.env\.template|CLAUDE\.md|settings\.json)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Secret/credential detected. Use .env files."}}'; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow"}}'; fi

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); DIR=$(pwd); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostCompact\",\"additionalContext\":\"CONTEXT RESTORE — Branch: $BRANCH | Dir: $DIR | Check CLAUDE.md Required Skills. Follow GitHub SOPs: conventional commits, branch naming, release protocol. Hooks active: destructive-blocker, SQL-guard, secret-scanner, auto-formatter, compaction-restorer.\"}}"

BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo none); HOOKS=$(ls .git/hooks/commit-msg 2>/dev/null && echo ok || echo missing); DIR=$(pwd); TOPLEVEL=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo none); REMOTE=$(git remote get-url origin 2>/dev/null || echo none); WARN=''; if [ "$TOPLEVEL" = "$HOME" ] && [ "$DIR" != "$HOME" ]; then WARN='WARNING: You are inside smorch-brain repo (home dir). If this is NOT a smorch-brain task, cd into the correct project subfolder with .git.'; fi; BEHIND=$(git status -sb 2>/dev/null | grep -c behind || true); if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then WARN="$WARN | WARNING: Local branch is BEHIND remote. Run git pull before starting work."; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"SESSION BOOTSTRAP — Branch: $BRANCH | Git root: $TOPLEVEL | Remote: $REMOTE | Git commit hook: $HOOKS | Hooks: destructive-blocker, SQL-guard-v2, secret-scanner-v2, auto-formatter, branch-protection-enforcer. $WARN\"}}"
